title: Wilson celebrates student achievement at annual leadership event
summary_en: From top academic performers to standout entrepreneurs, the Wilson College of Business Leadership Celebration honored the students who are leading, achieving and making a real impact — on campus and beyond.
title_cn: 威尔逊在年度领导力活动上表彰学生学业成就

title: Classroom to crime scene: Hands-On learning in UNI’s new Crime Scene House
summary_en: UNI criminology students are gaining hands-on investigative experience in the Crime Scene House, a realistic training space where staged evidence-based scenarios help bring classroom concepts to life.
title_cn: 从课堂到犯罪现场：北爱荷华大学新建犯罪现场实训屋开展实操教学

title: This UNI grad found a path at a major accounting firm immediately after graduation
summary_en: Alexis Munsell loves living the life of an accountant. It was a dream she realized at the University of Northern Iowa.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学一名毕业生毕业即入职大型会计师事务所
